issues.description: TrashFromHand is incorrect. Card text says 'trash 3 cards from the top of your deck', which means trashing from deck, not hand. Should use appropriate deck-trashing action.
Missing the conditional effect: 'Give up to 1 of your opponent's Characters −1 cost during this turn'. This should be a secondary action triggered after trashing 3 cards.
Missing duration 'DuringYourTurn' on the cost reduction effect. Text says 'during this turn' which requires duration:DuringYourTurn, not Permanent.
Effect structure incomplete. Should be optional (you may trash), with thenActions containing PowerBoost with negative value and proper target filtering for opponent's Characters.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] You may trash 3 cards from the top of your deck: Give up to 1 of your opponent's Characters −1 cost during this turn.
